title: PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER - 211info
text: PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides pregnancy tests and pregnancy options information. Services include prenatal, parenting, and life skills education and support, maternity clothing, baby clothing, toddler clothing, and diapers. Offers a weekly parent/child playgroup, and monthly parent lunch group. Provides miscarriage support, support after abortion, and connections to local resources. Does not provide referrals to abortion services. 475 Laurel Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, 4pm-7pm by appointment only Email (541) 902-2273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 902-2273 Main phone (541) 999-2427 Texting Main phone (541) 902-2273 Alternate (541) 999-2427 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County, Reedsport, Yachats, Waldport SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 10am - 4pm, 4pm-7pm by appointment only Services: Baby Clothing Childbirth Education Life Skills Education Parenting Skills Classes Postabortion Counseling Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - PPC PLAYGROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
